overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character in a spacesuit walking through a high-tech control room with red emergency lighting and numerous computer consoles. The character descends stairs and moves through interconnected rooms of what appears to be a spaceship or space station interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level control room with overhead monitor arrays

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the upper control room observing console displays and overhead monitors

entered.detail: large grid of suspended screens displaying data readouts hanging from ceiling
rows of computer workstations with glowing screens and control panels
safety railings along the edge of the upper walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an upper-level control room bathed in red emergency lighting. Overhead monitor arrays hang from the ceiling displaying data, while control consoles line the left side of the walkway. Metal safety railings run along the right edge of the elevated platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairwell transition between control room levels

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from red emergency to neutral yellow-green as character descends stairs
character passes through security door into lower control room section

agents.ego_description: descending metal stairs and proceeding through a security doorway into a lower level

entered.detail: metal handrails along the descending staircase
large metal doorway with frame leading to adjacent room

segments.scene_description: The character descends a metal stairwell as the lighting shifts from red to a neutral yellow-green tone. Passing through a security door at the bottom of the stairs, the scene transitions into a lower control room section with different console arrangements.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower control room with scattered workstations

events.description: character slows slightly while passing NPC standing at console

agents.ego_description: walking through lower control room area passing a technician working at a workstation

notable_agents.action: standing at a control console facing the screens

entered.detail: lower tier computer stations with multiple monitor displays
large structural pillar supporting the ceiling
metal safety barrier along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a lower control room with greenish ambient lighting, passing workstation consoles and a support column. A technician stands at a console on the right side as the character walks past, continuing toward a distant doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor leading to secondary control room

agents.ego_description: approaching a doorway at the end of the corridor leading to another section

entered.detail: metal framed doorway leading to the next room

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow corridor with metal railings, approaching an exit doorway at the far end. The lighting remains dim with red accent lights as the character moves toward the threshold of the next area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a high-tech facility that transitions from a red-lit emergency zone into a neutral-toned lower deck before returning to dim, accented corridors. It begins on an upper-level platform where the character walks past overhead monitor arrays and control consoles under a heavy red glow. As the character descends a metal stairwell, the lighting shifts from red to a neutral yellow-green tone, leading through a security door into a lower control room section. The scene then expands through this greenish ambient space, passing a support column and a technician at a workstation before turning toward a distant doorway. Finally, the camera follows the character down a narrow corridor with metal railings, moving through dim light and red accents toward the threshold of the next area.
